Member.title: Member
Member.description: Represents a member of the TransConnect platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Member entity, typically matching the Firebase Auth UID of the owner.

ownerId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who owns and manages this company account.

firstName.description: The first name of the member.

lastName.description: The last name of the member.

email.description: The email address of the member.

phone.description: The phone number of the member.

companyName.description: The registered business name of the member's transport business.

registrationNumber.description: The official registration number of the company.

vatNumber.description: The VAT registration number of the company.

streetAddress.description: The street address of the company.

city.description: The city of the company's address.

province.description: The province of the company's address.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the company's address.

membershipId.description: Reference to Membership tier ID (e.g., 'professional'). (Relationship: Member 1:1 Membership)

shopId.description: The ID of the shop owned by this member, linking to the shops subcollection.

rewardPoints.description: The number of reward points accumulated by the member for loyalty.

walletBalance.description: The cash balance in the member's wallet, in ZAR.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the member was created.

updatedAt.description: The server timestamp when the member was last updated.

MemberVersion.title: MemberVersion
MemberVersion.description: A historical snapshot of a Member's data at a specific point in time.

Shop.title: Shop
Shop.description: Represents a vendor's shop on the TransConnect platform.

heroBannerUrl.description: URL for the main hero banner image.

promotions.description: A list of promotional items or specials.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single product within a vendor's shop.

shopId.description: The ID of the parent shop this product belongs to.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The price of the product in ZAR.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit or other unique product identifier.

imageUrl.description: URL to the product image in Firebase Storage.

Staff.title: Staff
Staff.description: Represents a staff member associated with a Member's company.

firstName.description: The first name of the staff member.

lastName.description: The last name of the staff member.

email.description: The email address of the staff member.

role.description: The role or position of the staff member (e.g., Driver, Admin).

memberId.description: The UID of the parent Member this staff member belongs to.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the staff member was added.

Membership.title: Membership
Membership.description: Represents a single tier of membership plan for the TransConnect platform (e.g., Member, Professional, Enterprise).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Membership tier (e.g., 'professional').

name.description: Display name of the membership plan (e.g., Professional).

description.description: A short description of the ideal user for this plan.

annualDiscount.description: The discount percentage for an annual subscription.

sessionDiscount.description: The discount percentage for a session subscription.

features.description: A list of features included in this plan.

Contribution.title: Contribution
Contribution.description: Represents a single data contribution from a member.

userId.description: The UID of the contributing member.

data.description: The submitted data, which varies based on the contribution type.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the contribution was made.

Quote.title: Quote
Quote.description: Represents a funding quote generated by a member.

Enquiry.title: Enquiry
Enquiry.description: Represents a formal funding enquiry submitted by a member.

WalletPayment.title: WalletPayment
WalletPayment.description: Represents a pending wallet top-up or membership payment.

Charge.title: Charge
Charge.description: Represents a single billable item from TransConnect to a member (e.g., membership fee, SaaS fee).

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single financial transaction in the member's wallet ledger.

transactionId.description: Unique, sequential identifier for the transaction (e.g., R0724-001, P0724-001, ADJ0724-001).

reconciliationId.description: The ID of the reconciliation batch this transaction belongs to.

amount.description: The value of the transaction in ZAR.

date.description: The server timestamp the transaction occurred.

description.description: The raw description from the bank statement or a manual entry.

chartOfAccountsCode.description: The accounting code for this transaction (e.g., '4000-MembershipFees').

status.description: The status of the transaction in the reconciliation process.

isAdjustment.description: A flag to identify manual corrections or adjustments.

Reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
Reconciliation.description: Represents a single bank statement reconciliation batch.

reconciliationId.description: Unique identifier for the reconciliation batch (e.g., RECON-2024-07-30).

statementPeriod.description: The date range covered by the bank statement (e.g., '2024-07-01 to 2024-07-31').

openingBalance.description: The opening balance from the bank statement.

closingBalance.description: The closing balance from the bank statement.

status.description: The status of the reconciliation process.

processedAt.description: The server timestamp when the reconciliation was completed.

BankDetails.title: BankDetails
BankDetails.description: Represents the platform's central bank account details for EFT payments.

definition.description: Stores member profiles. Access is restricted to the authenticated user (path-based ownership).

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the member, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores historical snapshots of member data.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The UID of the parent member.

params.name: versionId
params.description: The unique ID for the data version.

definition.description: Stores funding quotes generated by the member.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The UID of the parent member.

params.name: quoteId
params.description: The unique ID for the quote.

definition.description: Stores formal funding enquiries made by the member.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The UID of the parent member.

params.name: enquiryId
params.description: The unique ID for the enquiry.

definition.description: Stores staff members associated with a parent member company.

definition.description: Stores individual financial transactions for a member. Writable by admins, readable by the associated member.

params.description: The UID of the parent member.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the financial transaction.

definition.description: Stores individual billing charges from TransConnect to the member. Writable by admins, readable by the member.

params.description: The UID of the parent member.

params.name: chargeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the charge.

definition.description: Subcollection for storing the shop belonging to a member. The member has full control.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The ID of the parent member.

params.name: shopId
params.description: The unique ID for the shop.

definition.description: Top-level collection for storing a public, read-only copy of approved shops. Managed by backend functions.

params.name: shopId
params.description: The unique ID for the shop.

definition.description: Subcollection for storing products belonging to a specific public shop.

params.name: shopId
params.description: The ID of the parent shop.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique ID for the product.

definition.description: Stores details of available membership plans (tiers), readable by all authenticated users.

params.name: membershipId
params.description: The unique identifier of the membership plan (e.g. 'professional').

definition.description: Stores anonymous data contributed by members across different categories (fleet, suppliers, etc.). Writable by any authenticated user, readable by admins.

params.name: contributionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the contribution document.

definition.description: Stores platform-wide configuration settings. The `configId` determines the document (e.g., 'bankDetails'). Publicly readable, admin writable.

params.name: configId
params.description: The unique identifier for the configuration document.

firestore.reasoning: The data model now uses a dual-collection strategy for shops to ensure security and functionality. A user's shop is created and managed within a subcollection at `/members/{memberId}/shops`, which is fully controlled by the owner via a recursive security rule. A top-level `/shops` collection exists to hold public, read-only copies of *approved* shops. This separation prevents users from listing each other's draft shops while allowing a public, queryable marketplace. A backend process (e.g., Cloud Function, not implemented here) would be responsible for copying an approved shop from the member's subcollection to the public top-level collection. Quotes, Enquiries, and Wallet Payments are now in their own dedicated subcollections under each member for clarity and to prevent data mixing.
